title: Alatiglossum reductum
taxonomy: Alatiglossum reductum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the broomrape family. This family comprises about 200 genera and over 2,000 species of parasitic or hemiparasitic plants. Alatiglossum reductum is a type of flowering plant that is native to Western Australia. The exact classification and taxonomy of the species may vary based on ongoing research and revisions to the plant kingdom.
